Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 1.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, ARR improved, and Q 2 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 1.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by April twenty second.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 2.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, gross margin improved, and Q 3 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 2.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by next Friday.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 3.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, pipeline conversion improved, and Q 4 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 3.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by April twenty ninth.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 4.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, renewal rate improved, and Q 5 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 4.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by end of month.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 5.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, free cash flow improved, and Q 6 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 5.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by May sixth.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 6.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, operating cash flow improved, and Q 7 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 6.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by next Wednesday.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 7.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, net retention improved, and Q 8 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 7.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by May thirteenth.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
Pierre. Welcome back to the quarterly earnings call block 8.
Sophie. Revenue growth remains strong, EBITDA improved, and Q 9 demand is holding up.
Analyst one. Can you comment on margin targets for the next quarter and the sequencing of the launch plan?
Pierre. We will keep the current guidance and review it again in block 8.
Sophie. I will send the updated investor deck and the investor FAQ by May twentieth.
Analyst two. Are you changing the launch date for the new platform, or are you still committed to the current window?
Pierre. No. The launch remains on May fifteen and that decision stands.
